version: AMOS Portfolio Battle Map & Migration Engine v0.1
purpose: Manage current positions, watchlist, and battlefield migration across narratives without emotional over-rotation.
core_problem: The user often identifies strong future themes early, but capital can get trapped in older positions or crowded trades.
core_principles: Do not rotate because something is hot; rotate because relative evidence improves.
Core, swing, tactical, and runner positions need different rules.
A correct thesis can still have bad timing.
Migration must compare opportunity cost, not just absolute attractiveness.
Exit from old battlefield should be evidence-based, not regret-based.

core.description: High-conviction, cycle-relevant, can be held through normal volatility.
rules: Do not panic sell normal pullbacks

swing.description: Cycle trade; enter/exit around Gann/AVWAP/TCG and event windows.
rules: Do not turn failed swing into core
Let upside run only if structure intact

step_2_new_battlefield_strength.question: 新战线是真启动还是短炒？

step_3_opportunity_cost.question: 继续占用资金是否错失更强机会？

IREN.migration_rule: Keep only if BTC/AI-compute thesis remains healthy and panic maturity is confirmed; do not add early during liquidity liquidation.

LITE.migration_rule: If Optical remains healthy but LITE lags CRDO/COHR, evaluate partial migration to stronger leader.

CRDO.migration_rule: Can remain key AI Infra exposure if relative strength and earnings evidence hold.

TEM.migration_rule: Hold only with clear evidence; size must reflect long-duration uncertainty.

IBM.migration_rule: Useful ballast; can fund high-beta if market regime strongly supports attack.

FIGR.migration_rule: Needs evidence upgrade before full build.

HOOD.migration_rule: Wait for mature reset; avoid buying just because headline dip looks attractive.

FRMI.migration_rule: Clarify thesis or reduce attention weight.

INFQ.migration_rule: Clarify thesis or reduce attention weight.

migration_actions.hold_old_no_new: Old position healthy and new theme not confirmed.
migration_actions.trim_old_probe_new: Old position is crowded/late, new theme early but not confirmed.
migration_actions.swap_partial: Old position weakening while new battlefield confirmed by leaders and capital flow.
migration_actions.sell_old_build_new: Old thesis broken, new opportunity confirmed with favorable timing.
migration_actions.wait_cash: Both old and new have poor timing or macro is hostile.

risk_guards: Do not chase a missed move out of regret, especially after missing ASTS-like move.
Do not migrate from a healthy leader to lower-quality tail just because tail is moving faster.
Do not let a failed swing become a core position.
Do not sell stabilizer assets solely to chase high beta during late-cycle FOMO.
Always compare next 2-6 week opportunity cost.
